content.en:
Now, a large number of Domain Ancestors have been born in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, after all, the cultivation environment is better, and there are a lot more resources that can help the cultivation of half-step Domain Ancestors.

In the past, if a half-step Domain Ancestor wanted to be promoted to the Domain Ancestor level, it would take endless long years, and even until the day when the Dao Heart collapsed, there was no way to raise the cultivation to the Domain Ancestor level.

But now it's different, a large number of resources can quickly increase the improvement of half-step domain ancestor cultivation, and it will soon be able to be promoted to the realm of unity, and then complete the fusion of the forbidden path and the flesh path, as long as you comprehend the mysteries of the domain ancestor again, you can impact the domain ancestor realm.

Therefore, the Xuanxu Holy Realm has now given birth to a large number of domain ancestors, and most of these domain ancestors are from the human race, after all, the human race occupies the entire Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Moreover, the number of Terrans now is tens of thousands of times more than they were at the beginning, which is also the result of the efforts of countless people of the Terrans.

Of course, the Terran Domain Ancestors are basically ordinary Domain Ancestors, and it is still relatively difficult to be promoted to an elite Domain Ancestor, which requires a long period of penance and countless resources.

Ye Tian's progress is not small, he created the Domain Ancestor Method, the Endless Domain Method, and now he is also cultivating the Endless Domain Method, and the domain power, domain body and soul on his body are becoming more and more pure and powerful, and now he has reached the limit level of the Great Perfection of the Ordinary Domain Body.

This is the real limit, and it can't be advanced at the ordinary domain ancestor level.

If Ye Tian wanted to improve his cultivation strength, he could only break through the realm and become an elite domain ancestor.

"It's time to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, he had reached the extreme of an ordinary domain ancestor, why didn't he break through?

The human world.

Ye Tian began to retreat and impact the Elite Domain Ancestor Realm, he only needed to let the ordinary domain body transform into the elite domain body.

It is not difficult for Ye Tian to transform the domain body, not to mention that he has created the Endless Domain Method, the Domain Ancestral Method, which makes the transformation of the domain body even easier.

this day.

Ye Tian's domain body easily broke through, and he began to transform from an ordinary domain body to an elite domain body. It is also a metamorphosis.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian's domain body is getting stronger and stronger, and his domain power is also skyrocketing rapidly, and his strength is constantly improving.

This metamorphosis took decades to complete.

At this time, Ye Tian's strength had increased by about ten times, and this had only just broken through to the Elite Domain Ancestor level.

If Ye Tian fought with the original Six Holy Sons now, he would be able to kill them all easily.

After cultivating to reach the Elite Domain Ancestor level, Ye Tian spent some time stabilizing his current realm and began to take ancestral medicine.

At the beginning, he had only refined one-tenth of the ancestral medicine, so this ancestral medicine was enough for him to use to the top Domain Ancestor level.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to refine the ancestral medicine, and after refining only three-tenths of the ancestral medicine, he successfully raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the Elite Domain Ancestor.

After that, he only needed to cultivate the Endless Domain Law to continuously refine the domain body and domain power, and strengthen the soul, so that he could be promoted to the extreme of the Elite Domain Ancestor, but this step also took a lot of time.

And since there was the Xuanxu Holy Realm, Ye Tian was equivalent to using the Creation Mixed Yuan Well to cultivate in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and it was also of great help in assisting in the comprehension of the Holy Technique, although it was not as good as the Ancestor Method, but the effect was also quite good.

As long as Ye Tian was given enough time, he could even cultivate a holy technique to the extreme level.

The days passed slowly, and Ye Tian's one of Ye Tian's holy skills had reached the realm of perfection.

It can be said that almost all of the holy techniques that Ye Tian has cultivated so far have reached the consummation realm, and his strength is much stronger than in the past.

this day.

When Ye Tian was in retreat and cultivating, a treasure was born somewhere in the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

---------------

Xuanxu Holy Realm, Canggu Realm.

The Canggu Realm is a newly born Void Realm in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and there are many treasures in it, so it often has Dao Ancestors and even Domain Ancestors of the Human Race enter it to hunt for treasures.

However, the golden light shone in all directions, attracting the attention of many domain ancestors.

Suddenly, a domain ancestor shuttled over.

Soon, they found traces of the treasure.

They discovered that the treasure that emitted countless golden lights was a small golden tower, which exuded an aura similar to that of the War Realm Tower.

"This is a holy relic!!!!

All the Domain Ancestors were moved.

Holy relics, what a precious treasure, even if it is just an ordinary holy relic, the value is incomparably high, even the Supreme Domain Ancestor may not be able to obtain a holy relic.

If they obtained a holy artifact, they could trade with the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, or sell it to the War Realm Tower, and they would be able to obtain a large number of resources and treasures.

It can be said that if they snatch this holy relic, they will be rich!

Whoa!!!!

A Domain Ancestor flew to snatch the relics, but was blown away by the golden light.

At this time, they remembered that if the holy relics were not fully conceived, they were protected by the rules during this period, and they could not forcibly snatch the holy relics unless they were supreme ancestors.

So, these domain ancestors were waiting one by one.

Now, this holy relic has shown a vision, and it will not be long before it is fully conceived.

In the blink of an eye, months have passed.

Abrupt!

The golden light was restrained, and the aura of the holy relic became strong and stable.

At this time, many domain ancestors started to do so.

But at this moment, a robe of stars appeared, blocking all the domain ancestors.

In an instant, a figure appeared, approaching the holy relic.

"I want this holy relic!"

The man spoke.

Many domain ancestors retreated one by one, and no one dared to compete with them.

Without him, just because the person who came was not an ordinary person, but the son of the Lord of the Human Race, the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Law Domains, Ye Xingchen, who is now also called the Ancestor of the Star Domain!

The strength of the Star Domain Ancestor is not ordinary, and now it is also the cultivation of the peak of the elite Domain Ancestor, if it were not for the purpose of stabilizing the realm and refining the domain power, I am afraid that he would have already stepped into the top Domain Ancestor level, and even began to impact the strongest Domain Ancestor.

Together, these ordinary domain ancestors, they are no match for the Star Domain Ancestor, so naturally they don't dare to snatch the holy relics with the Star Domain Ancestor.

It's a pity, but they have no choice but to give up.

Ye Xingchen took the holy artifact, returned to the human realm, and then began to refine this holy artifact.

It was a long time before he refined this holy relic and learned the name of this holy relic - the Golden Light Pagoda!

This is an ordinary holy relic, it is a holy relic with both defense and suppression, it is quite good, although it is far inferior to the holy relic on the list of holy relics in the dark holy realm, but the holy relic was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, which is an important signal!

So, Ye Xingchen came to meet his father Ye Tian and informed him about the birth of the holy relic.
